S.FORM: Rafael Correa I 1963 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 6 a romi'ad masofoc ci Rafael Correa, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Ecuador anini i ci Rafael Correa, patirengan a romi'ad i 2007 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 15 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: rafa…ô…ĺ ¶o~urr…ôa i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i rafa…ô…ĺ ¶o~urr…ôa, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u …ô ¶o~u~ua…¨~…ģo~ur anini i ¶i rafa…ô…ĺ ¶o~urr…ôa, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: Rafael Correa I 1963 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 6 a romi'ad masofoc ci Rafael Correa, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Ecuador anini i ci Rafael Correa, patirengan a romi'ad i 2007 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 15 a romi'ad.
